task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive dots), False otherwise.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i- followed by exactly 17 hexadecimal characters).
